full_text:
Pang Yan
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Pang Yanwas born in Youfufeng. A man of local distinction, recommended by Zhang Ji to Cao Cao. Had successful career. Pang Yan was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom.
